arts.ttl: Leeds’ rivals all draw 1-1, two red cards, mass scuffles
arts.sum: Sheffield United and Burnley both had the opportunity to lay down a marker to Leeds on Tuesday night by claiming home victories against Bristol City and West Brom respectively. Leeds United look like they’ve finally been handed something of a favour by others in the division, as Sheffield United, Burnley and Sunderland all drew 1-1 on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: ‘Brilliant season’ – Leeds United player hailed by Daniel Farke ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has said Dan James has been ‘brilliant’ for him this season. Leeds United… The post ‘Brilliant season’ – Leeds United player hailed by Daniel Farke ahead of Millwall clash appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Millwall amid caution over ‘knocks and bruises’
arts.sum: Patrick Bamford, who suffered a hamstring injury in January, partially returned to team training last week but Farke has always underlined how he would need a few sessions to get back up to speed before being reintroduced to the matchday squad. Daniel Farke expects to have the same Leeds United squad that travelled to Portsmouth available for Wednesday’s home clash with Millwall, despite a few bumps and bruises from the weekend.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Championship predictions including Leeds vs. Millwall
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Millwall.

arts.ttl: Leeds United handed major Championship promotion race boost after latest results
arts.sum: Leeds United may have been moved off the top of the Championship table - but there is no doubt it proved to be a successful evening with closest rivals Sheffield United and Burnley both dropping points. As for Burnley, they squandered the chance to leapfrog Leeds into second after drawing 1-1 at home against West Brom.

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta returns to first-team training for the first time since horror injury against Millwall
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta has returned to first-team training for the first time since being on the end of a horror tackle that left him hospitalised and requiring 26 stitches.

arts.ttl: Graeme Souness cranks up Rangers hype with strident Leeds United feeder club claim amid 'gold dust' 49ers bid
arts.sum: Andy Mason helped put the feelers out for new investment and reckons potential is there to match Celtic's growth

arts.ttl: Neil Warnock issues Leeds United comment as Burnley have chance to leapfrog
arts.sum: The pressure of the promotion race meant that Leeds were never ever going to run away with it to the league title despite beating both Sunderland and Sheffield United back-to-back. Leeds United might be kicking off tomorrow against Millwall sitting in third, a testament to how quickly the state of the promotion race can change after the Whites were eight clear of Burnley 10 days ago.

arts.ttl: How Leeds United's final 10 Champ matches compare to promotion rivals
arts.sum: Leeds have won 22 of their 36 league fixtures so far this season - while the Blades have lost six compared to the Whites' four defeats. The side also have the Steel City derby at Sheffield Wednesday to contest which although against poorer performing opposition this time around always proves to be a challenge for both competitors who share tight historic results when it comes to playing against each other.

arts.ttl: Leeds United get Brenden Aaronson boost as USA make squad call for international break
arts.sum: Leeds United playmaker Brenden Aaronson will be granted a rest over the international break after not making the USA squad for their upcoming Concacaf Nations League fixtures. Aaronson has started each of the last 34 Championship matches, only being handed a break during FA Cup ties.
